title: Filter by Subitem status
excerpt: We need to filter by SubItem Status, how come it’s not possible?

posts.author: DeniseCookUnity (Denise)
posts.cookedHtml: We need to filter by SubItem Status, how come it’s not possible?

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DeniseCookUnity !

Unfortunately monday.com just has this feature for the item. As of now I believe that it includes subitems if you show the summary on the parent items though!

I would highly suggest taking a look at this post and voting here. It will help monday.com recognize popular topics for their users.
